text:
Once upon a time in the lush, verdant forest of Evergreen, there lived a young qilin named Qwen. Qwen was special from birth; her coat shimmered with iridescent hues that changed with the light, and her horn glowed faintly under moonlight. She had been taught to harness her magical abilities, which included the power to heal and communicate with animals.

One day, as Qwen roamed through the forest, she noticed that a group of birds was fluttering about in distress. Upon closer inspection, she saw that their young had fallen from their nests and were too injured to fly back up. Qwen approached them gently and used her healing touch to mend their wings and wounds. The birds, grateful and happy, flew back to their nests, chirping songs of gratitude.

News of Qwen’s kind actions spread quickly through the forest. Soon, other animals came to her for help when they or their kin were hurt. Qwen listened to their
